title: Mark Todo as Complete or Edit Text
user_story: As a user, I want to mark tasks as done or edit their text, so that my list stays accurate and up-to-date.
acceptance_criteria: Each todo in the list has an option to toggle its completion status such as a checkbox.
Completed todos are visually distinguished with strikethrough or dimmed styling.
Users can edit the text of a todo, and changes reflect immediately upon saving.
All updates persist only for the current browser session in memory.
